title: Notice of opening of on-ramp from Louis Fourie road to N2 (Cape Town)
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - The newly constructed on-ramp from Louis Fourie Road to the N2 (Cape Town direction) will be re-opened to traffic on 09 May 2025 (weather permitting).","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - The newly constructed on-ramp from Louis Fourie Road to the N2 (Cape Town direction) will be re-opened to traffic on 09 May 2025 (weather permitting)."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The Western Cape Government is working hard to maintain our roads."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Please drive carefully during this period of construction. Let us work together to ensure that our roads are safe - for you.","html":"Please drive carefully during this period of construction. Let us work together to ensure that our roads are safe - for you."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Reopen N2-onramp on 09 May 2025","html":"Reopen N2-onramp on 09 May 2025"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Photo supplied.","html":"Photo supplied."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
